message:
fix(runtime): fix multi-channel subscribe/unsubscribe response format

Multi-channel SUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/SSUBSCRIBE and their unsubscribe
counterparts were returning raw RESP bytes wrapped in BulkString instead
of a proper Array of per-channel response Arrays. Fixed to return
Array(replies) matching Redis wire format and conformance expectations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
